prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年海南省综合类最低录取位次分别为约3913名→4250名→4132名→4713名→4963名，整体呈持续后移趋势，近4年累计后移约1050名，2025年基准位次约496 3名；该校在海南省综合类招生计划：2021–2023年均为9人，2024年增至10人，2025年增至12人，2026年进一步扩至15人，较2025年扩招25%，扩招幅 度较大，有助于缓解竞争压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华中农业大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年位列第45名，近年排名稳定在42–47名区间，学校层次较高 且声誉良好；该校在2021–2026年声誉文件中均未出现重大舆情事件，声誉平稳；抖音热度排名第54位（较热），短视频曝光量处于中等偏上水平，报考关注度 一般；第五轮学科评估中，兽医学A+、畜牧学A+、作物学A、水产A、食品科学与工程A，共5个A-及以上学科，农林学科实力突出，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校招生专业以农林类为主，相关专业社会热度平稳；海南省2026年高考考生总数约78000人，较2025年67408人增长约15.7%，竞争明显加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年计划扩招25%（缓解竞争）与本省考生总数大幅增长15.7% （加剧竞争）两股相反力量，扩招效应已被，考生增长带来的额外竞争压力使位次。预测2026年最低录取位次约5667名，区间5167–6167名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 植物生产类（含农学、植物科学与技术等）
- 工商管理类（含会计学、财务管理等）
- 经济学类（含经济学、国际经济与贸易等）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等难度）
- 动物医学
- 大数据管理与应用
- 管理科学与工程类（含工程管理、信息管理与信息系统）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 机械类（含机械设计制造及其自动化等）
- 动物科学（国家卓越农林人才计划）
- 水产类（含水产养殖学、水族科学与技术）
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间5167–6167名内，建议以二档专业（动物医学、大数据管理与应用）为主攻方向，一档专业（植物生产类、工商管理类）作为冲刺，三档专业（机械类、动物科学 、水产类）作为稳妥保底。动物医学和动物科学虽属农林类但学科评估A+，性价比较高，值得重点关注。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for comprehensive subjects in Hainan Province were approximately 3913 → 4250 → 4132 → 4713 → 4963, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1050 places in the past 4 years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 4963. The enrollment plan for comprehensive subjects in Hainan Province: 9 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 10 in 2024, 12 in 2025, and further expanded to 15 in 2026, a 25% increase compared to 2025, which helps alleviate competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Huazhong Agricultural University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked 45th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in the 42–47 range in recent years, indicating a high school level and good reputation. The university has not experienced any major public opinion incidents in the reputation documents from 2021 to 2026, maintaining a stable reputation. Douyin popularity ranking is 54th (relatively hot), with short video exposure at an upper-middle level, and application attention is average. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Veterinary Medicine A+, Animal Husbandry A+, Crop Science A, Aquaculture A, Food Science and Engineering A, a total of 5 A- and above disciplines, with outstanding agricultural and forestry disciplines, strongly attracting applicants for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The university's enrollment majors are mainly in agriculture and forestry, with stable social popularity for related majors. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Hainan Province college entrance examination is about 78,000, an increase of about 15.7% from 67,408 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the 2026 plan to expand enrollment by 25% (alleviating competition), and the significant 15.7% increase in the total number of candidates in the province (intensifying competition), the expansion effect has been offset by the additional competitive pressure from candidate growth. The predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is about 5667, with a range of 5167–6167.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Plant Production (including Agronomy, Plant Science and Technology, etc.)
- Business Administration (including Accounting, Financial Management, etc.)
- Economics (including Economics, International Economics and Trade, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium Difficulty)
- Veterinary Medicine
- Big Data Management and Application
- Management Science and Engineering (including Engineering Management, Information Management and Information Systems)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Mechanical (including Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, etc.)
- Animal Science (National Excellent Agricultural and Forestry Talent Program)
- Aquaculture (including Aquaculture, Aquatic Science and Technology)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 5167–6167, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Veterinary Medicine, Big Data Management and Application) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Plant Production, Business Administration) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Mechanical, Animal Science, Aquaculture) as a safe backup. Although Veterinary Medicine and Animal Science are in the agriculture and forestry category, they have A+ discipline evaluations, offering high cost-effectiveness and are worth special attention.
